focus: RQ-01 depth + RQ-03 depth + RQ-04 groundwork
noveltyJustification: 7 depth findings (F8-F14); 5 fully novel (F8/F9/F10/F11/F12), 2 refine+extend iter 1 (F13/F14 weight 0.5 each) = 6.0/7 ≈ 0.857
ruledOut: hypothesis: tree-sitter has call_expression query but it is bypassed — FALSE, structurally absent
hypothesis: semantic-lock.ts provides concurrency locking — FALSE, it is a weight-gate assertion

text: Tree-sitter AST walker has NO call_expression capture or kind. walkAST emits 10 capture kinds (function/method/class/interface/type_alias/enum/import/export/variable/parameter) — no 'call'. CALLS is structurally regex-only, not a wiring bug.

Parser backend tagging (detectorProvenanceFromParserBackend('treesitter')) is overridden by the CALLS emitter hard-setting detectorProvenance='heuristic'+evidenceClass='INFERRED'. Provenance-filtering consumers discard 100% of CALLS edges even on successful tree-sitter parses.

Trust-state machine branches in strict priority: (1) !daemonAvailable → 'unavailable', (2) !hasSources||!hasArtifact → 'absent', (3) sourceChanged → 'stale', (4) else 'live'. 5th conceptual state is the recovered-generation downgrade path. isReaderUsable admits 'live' and 'stale'; gates on 'absent' and 'unavailable'.

VIOLATION POSSIBLE: Reader can snapshot 'live' AFTER invalidateSkillGraphCaches fires but BEFORE its listener processes the event (torn read). No barrier enforces 'all listeners drained' before readers observe invalidation.

VIOLATION POSSIBLE: Generation bump is discipline-enforced, not structurally enforced. A code path that bumps generation without calling invalidateSkillGraphCaches leaves caches serving the stale generation. Contrast: the in-process TTL cache in freshness.ts:371-376 IS keyed structurally and is immune.

VIOLATION POSSIBLE: Listener added during cache-invalidation fan-out may miss the current event (listeners Set iterated during mutation; JS guarantees insertion order but not stability under concurrent add).
rebuild-from-source.ts (95 lines) has ZERO lock/mutex/concurrent/acquire/release primitives. Rebuild concurrency is enforced by single-writer process-level discipline, not in-code locking.

semantic-lock.ts is a WEIGHT lock (assertion that weights.semantic_shadow===0 during firstPromotionWave), NOT a concurrency lock. Semantic lane locking is enforced at three layers: (1) compile-time Zod z.literal(0), (2) promotion-time assertSemanticLiveWeightLocked, (3) two-consecutive-shadow-cycle rule.

Two-cycle-requirement is purely binary accumulation. consecutivePasses reads only entry.passed (boolean); ignores optional candidateAccuracy and deltaVsLive. Shadow-cycle.ts DOES compute deltaVsLive (lines 124-189) but eligibility-layer discards it. A cycle passing with deltaVsLive=+0.01 counts identical to +0.15.

CONFIRMED: 3 of 12 promotion gates (25%) are typed 'readonly boolean' — magnitude-blind. Specifically ambiguityStable, derivedLaneAttributionComplete, stuffingRejected. The remaining 9 gates use numeric thresholds. A parity slice flipping true→false by a single adversarial example sinks the whole bundle; a slice barely passing is indistinguishable from robust pass.
structural_gap: tree-sitter-parser.ts → structural-indexer.ts::CALLS-regex (tree-sitter produces no call_expression captures; regex is the only CALLS source)
overrides_provenance: structural-indexer.ts::CALLS → tree-sitter-parser.ts::detectorProvenance (CALLS hard-sets 'heuristic' regardless of parser backend)
priority_branch: trust-state.ts::createTrustState → 'unavailable' > 'absent' > 'stale' > 'live' (top-priority branch on daemonAvailable short-circuits everything)
captures_but_ignores: shadow-cycle.ts::deltaVsLive → two-cycle-requirement.ts::consecutivePasses (magnitude data computed but eligibility ignores it)
typed_boolean: gate-bundle.ts::paritySlices → {ambiguityStable, derivedLaneAttributionComplete, stuffingRejected} (typed readonly boolean; no numeric threshold)

Hypothesis 'tree-sitter-parser.ts has call_expression query but not wired to CALLS emitter' — FALSE. Parser walks AST but emits 10 non-call capture kinds only; call_expression is never visited. Remediation path is NET-NEW code (add RawCapture.kind='call' + emit branch + extractor branch), not a wiring fix.
sources: grep: call_expression → 0 hits, CALLS → 0 hits in emit paths

text: Hypothesis 'semantic-lock.ts enforces concurrency on the semantic lane' — FALSE. It is a weight-gate assertion (firstPromotionWave ⇒ semantic_shadow===0), enforced via throw. Concurrency for scoring lives elsewhere (not surfaced yet).

RQ-01 resolved at depth: All 10 declared EdgeTypes are emitted. CALLS is the sole structurally-heuristic edge type (9/10 are AST-EXTRACTED, 1/10 is regex-INFERRED). The tree-sitter AST walker has no call_expression capture and no 'call' RawCapture.kind — regex is the ONLY CALLS source regardless of parser backend. CALLS edges always emit detectorProvenance='heuristic'+evidenceClass='INFERRED'. Persisted summary flattens 10 types to 5 evidence classes with one confidence scalar (no per-edge-type coverage). Rate-of-edge-loss sub-question deferred to a runtime measurement iteration.

RQ-03 resolved at depth: State machine has 4 typed states + 1 rewritten-stale (recovered-generation). Actual names are 'live'|'stale'|'absent'|'unavailable' — NOT 'fallback' (fallbackMode is an orthogonal 'sqlite'|'json'|'none' field). Five invariants INV-F1..INV-F5 documented (iter 1 F5). INV-F5 has THREE concurrency exposures (INV-F5-V1 torn read, INV-F5-V2 discipline-only generation bump, INV-F5-V3 listener-add-during-dispatch). semantic-lock.ts is a weight-gate not a concurrency lock. rebuild-from-source.ts has zero lock primitives (process-level single-writer discipline).
